description: Fail-closed contract for docgen-command execution responses.
forbidden_phrases: I don't have the ability to
I don't have access to your files
contract_fail_response: docgen-command did not return a valid operation response. Confirm the operation type (GENERATE_PROPOSAL, PARSE_DOCUMENT, EXPORT_PDF, LIST_TEMPLATES) and retry with complete inputs.
notes: EXPORT_PDF requires local docgen-render pipeline with LibreOffice on PATH. If running in Claude cloud runtime, EXPORT_PDF is unavailable — inform the user and direct them to run export_pdf=True locally.
